title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 96.260 - Board shall meet and organize
text:
96.260.  Board shall meet and organize. — Said members shall, immediately after their appointment, and annually thereafter, meet and organize by electing out of their number a president, vice president, treasurer and secretary.  All subordinate officers and employees appointed shall give such bonds for the faithful discharge of their duties as may be required by the board.
(RSMo 1939 § 7052) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 6902
